task_description: Implement a periodic background UsageCheckScheduler that automatically refreshes usage/quota for all active OAuth provider connections, expose its status via API, and display worker status (next run, running state, last run) on the Quota dashboard page

verification.summary: TypeScript check (npx tsc --noEmit) passes clean. Build fails on pre-existing error in /dashboard/cli-tools page (TypeError: z?.toLowerCase) - confirmed same failure on base branch without our changes. Tests: 186/187 test files pass; 1 pre-existing failure in status-handling-transient-auth.test.ts (TypeScript syntax error in require()) unrelated to changes.
